return(function(h,C,Z,P,R,z,U,o,x,H,B,I,t,N,v,m,E,f,j,X,k,e)e,v,x,N,j,B,X,f,t,o,H,I,m,E,k=function(h,L)local C=X(L)local Z=function(Z,P,R,z,U)return f(h,{Z;P,R,z,U},L,C)end return Z
